title: Smoked Sweet Tunisian Almond Cake
description: A lightly smoked almond cake infused with citrus and aromatic spices, sweetened with honey and flavored with cooking wine, perfect for a low-carb snack that kids love.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180C and line a 20cm round cake pan with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl whisk together almond flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and smoked paprika.
In a separate bowl beat the egg whites until soft peaks form, then add honey, cooking wine, lemon zest, and vanilla extract, folding gently.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, then fold in melted butter.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and tap the pan lightly to release air bubbles.
Place the pan in a cold smoker set to produce mellow smoke for 10 minutes, then transfer it to the oven.
Bake the cake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Slice the cake into bite-size squares and serve warm or at room temperature.
Garnish with a drizzle of honey and a pinch of ground cinnamon, if desired.
